free_text: Target residues from the reaction of 3.65 A*GeV C-12
with Th-232 and U-238.
In English
The targets were thorium and uranium foils with a
thickness of 20-150 mg/cm2 evaporated on a thin
aluminium layer surrounded by 17.5 mg/cm2 catcher
foils. The target stacks were preceded on the upstream
side by three 20 mg/cm2 aluminium foils.
